name: CYPHERPUNK TECHNOLOGIES INC.
business: Cypherpunk Technologies Inc. is a privacy technology company implementing a digital asset treasury strategy anchored by Zcash, and through its wholly-owned subsidiary Leap Therapeutics, it is developing novel therapies for cancer. The company does not currently have any approved products for sale and has not generated product revenue.

exposures.sentence: Our subsidiary, Leap, is a biopharmaceutical company developing novel biomarker-targeted antibody therapies designed to treat patients with cancer and other diseases with high unmet medical need.
We are a privacy technology company implementing a digital asset treasury strategy anchored by Zcash.
Security breaches and cyberattacks are of particular concern with respect to digital assets, including ZEC.
Quantum computing, in particular, presents a long-term threat to the cryptographic assumptions underpinning the Zcash Network.

catalysts.event: EU regulations prohibiting transactions with anonymous wallets and privacy-focused digital assets such as ZEC take effect
catalysts.sentence: beginning on July 1, 2027, regulations in the European Union will prohibit transactions involving anonymous wallets and privacy-focused digital assets such as ZEC.

tamClaims.claim: Over 2.3 million new cases of colorectal cancer globally in 2030, with nearly 1.1 million deaths
tamClaims.sentence: According to the World Health Organization (WHO), there will be over 2.3 million new cases of CRC in 2030, with nearly 1.1 million deaths.

tamClaims.claim: In the United States, 158,850 newly diagnosed cases of CRC and 55,230 estimated deaths from CRC
tamClaims.sentence: According to the American Cancer Society (ACS), in the United States, there will be 158,850 newly diagnosed cases of CRC and 55,230 estimated deaths from CRC.

tamClaims.claim: Fixed maximum supply of 21 million ZEC
tamClaims.sentence: The Zcash protocol establishes a fixed maximum supply of 21 million ZEC, which are introduced into circulation over time through block rewards.
